column4: A battle-worn knight who meets every trial head-on.
A warlord who breaks enemy lines through sheer force.
A streetwise bruiser who thrives when the fight turns messy.
A disciplined duelist with a steady hand and colder nerve.
A relentless machine built to keep marching through the swarm.
A quick-draw outlaw who turns panic into momentum.
A nimble trickster who never stays where danger lands.
A silent hunter who lets the dark speak for him.
A chaos-fueled duelist who wins fights by overwhelming the room.
A deadpan menace who walks into disaster without blinking.
A cold-eyed wanderer hardened by long roads and worse winters.
A grim scavenger king draped in dust, gold, and bad omens.
